patch.value: Add types/statuses/fields/seed-template counts to presets list rows. Keep backward compatible keys. Document in README that apply is idempotent (skips existing templates, deep-merges settings, --force to clobber, --dry-run preview), and that registerItemFields scalar fields (#97) cannot be set via pm create so seeds use built-in fields only.
Enrich presets list output + add --json; document apply idempotency

presets list enriched in src/index.ts via buildListRows (src/catalog.ts): now includes governance, idPrefix, itemTypes (built-in), customItemTypes, templateCount. --json added. README documents apply idempotency (deep-merge settings, skip-existing-templates, --force, --dry-run) and #97 seeds-builtin-fields-only caveat. Backward compatible: existing keys id/name/command/templates/description retained.
